calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances for Thursday morning, OCT-29-2009: Joshua S. White, Dep. City Attorney, for S.F.P.D.; Manuel Aguilar, Jr. appearing in Propria Persona on his own behalf this date.
ALL PARTIES AND WITNESSES ARE ADMINISTERED THE OATH BY THE CLERK.
THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND PROCEEDS TO HEAR PRELIMINARY STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. THE COURT THEN HEARS A MOTION IN LIMINE PRESENTED BY DEP. CITY ATTORNEY WHITE, WHICH IS DENIED BY THE COURT AT 10:33 A.M.
(10:35 TO 10:43 A.M.: DEP. CITY ATTORNEY WHITE RECEIVES PERMISSION FROM THE COURT TO SET UP
EQUIPMENT IN THE COURTROOM.)
10:43 A.M.: THE FOLLOWING EXHIBIT IS MARKED FOR RESPONDENT MANUEL AGUILAR, JR.:
1. GROUP EXHIBIT: TWO DOCUMENTS, ONE FROM OFFICE OF CIT. COMPLAINTS ID.
10:43 A.M.: S.F.P.D. OFFICER DAVID FRIAS, PREVIOUSLY SWORN AND STILL UNDER OATH, TAKES THE STAND; DIRECT EXAMINATION BY DEP. CITY ATTORNEY WHITE TAKES PLACE UNTIL 11:23 A.M.
11:24 A.M.: CROSS-EXAM OF SFPD OFF. DAVID FRIAS BY MANUEL AGUILAR, JR. THEN OCCURS TO 11:29.
11:29 A.M.: DEP. CITY ATTNY. WHITE CALLS SFPD OFF. MICHELLE LIDEICOET, PREV. SWORN & UNDER OATH, TAKES THE STAND; DIRECT EXAM BY COUNSEL WHITE OCCURS UNTIL 11:34 A.M.
11:34 A.M.: CROSS-EXAM OF SFPD OFF. LIEDICOET BY AGUILAR, JR. UNTIL 11:35 AM.
11:36 A.M.: SFPD OFF. DEBRA KING, PREV. SWN. & UND. OATH, APPEARS; DIRECT BY COUNSEL WHITE
UNTIL 11:37 A.M.; 11:38 AM: DON STUART CAMERON IS CALLED BY DEP. CITY ATTNY, PREV. SWORN.
11:39 A.M.: DIRECT EXAM BY COUNSEL WHITE OCCURS UNTIL 11:45 A.M. & EXCUSED AT 11:47 A.M.
11:47 A.M.: THE COURT CONDUCTS VOIR DIRE OF MANUEL AGUILAR, JR., FOLLOWED BY BRIEF SUMMATION PRESENTED BY DEP. CITY ATTORNEY WHITE UNTIL 12:10 P.M.
12:12 P.M.: THEREUPON, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE COURT.

12:15 P.M.: COURT IS ADJOURNED.
